div.div: Indicates that the connector is completely configured and can begin processing. This call can be used to register with non-blocking services. For example it can register a listener with the OMAS Out Topic with the context.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 468px; margin-left: 833px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
For saving connector instance identifier and connection object.
Called from the ConnectorBroker.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 502px; margin-left: 753px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div: Provides the name of the connector for logging.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 548px; height: 1px; padding-top: 654px; margin-left: 666px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Used for blocking calls to wait for new metadata. It is called from its own thread iff the connector is configured to have its own thread. It is recommended that the engage() method returns when each blocking call completes. The integration daemon will pause a second and then call engage() again. This pattern enables the calling thread to detect the shutdown of the integration daemon server.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 794px; margin-left: 666px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Free up any resources held since the connector is no longer needed.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 548px; height: 1px; padding-top: 724px; margin-left: 666px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Requests that the connector does a comparison of the metadata in the third party technology and open metadata repositories. Refresh is called when the integration connector first starts and then at intervals defined in the connector's configuration as well as any external REST API calls to explicitly refresh the connector. This is when the target processors are called.
